name: Classic Chocolate Cake
description: A rich, moist chocolate cake layered with silky ganache and topped with chocolate shavings.
ingredients: Dark chocolate, butter, eggs, flour, sugar, cocoa powder, heavy cream
preparation: Baked fresh daily. Takes 2-3 hours preparation time.

name: Red Velvet Cake
description: Velvety red sponge with cream cheese frosting. A timeless classic.
ingredients: Red velvet mix, cream cheese, vanilla, butter, sugar
preparation: Baked to order. Ready in 3 hours.

name: Eggless Vanilla Sponge
description: Light and fluffy vanilla sponge, completely egg-free. Perfect for all.
ingredients: Flour, milk, vanilla extract, baking powder, vegetable oil, sugar

name: Black Forest Cake
description: German-style cake with cherries, whipped cream and chocolate sponge.
ingredients: Chocolate sponge, whipped cream, cherries, kirsch, chocolate shavings

name: Lemon Drizzle Cake
description: Zesty lemon cake with a light drizzle glaze and fresh lemon zest.
ingredients: Flour, butter, eggs, lemon zest, sugar, yogurt
preparation: Baked fresh with a citrus glaze finish.

name: Eggless Carrot Cake
description: Spiced carrot cake topped with creamy frosting — completely egg-free and moist.
ingredients: Flour, carrots, vegetable oil, brown sugar, cinnamon, walnuts
preparation: Slow-baked for a moist texture and fresh flavour.

name: Butter Croissant
description: Flaky, buttery croissant with a golden crust and soft layered interior.
ingredients: All-purpose flour, butter, yeast, milk, sugar, salt
preparation: Laminated dough, takes 8 hours of cold rest.

name: Raspberry Almond Tart
description: Buttery tart shell filled with almond cream and topped with fresh raspberries.
ingredients: Flour, butter, almonds, cream, raspberries, sugar

name: Espresso Brownie
description: Rich chocolate brownie infused with espresso and topped with crunchy nuts.
ingredients: Dark chocolate, butter, eggs, sugar, espresso powder, walnuts
preparation: Baked fresh and served warm for the best taste.

name: Classic Apple Pie
description: Warm apple pie with cinnamon-spiced filling and a flaky golden crust.
ingredients: Apples, flour, butter, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg
preparation: Made fresh and served with a crunchy top layer.

name: Chocolate Pecan Pie
description: Decadent pie with chocolate ganache and toasted pecans in a buttery crust.
ingredients: Flour, butter, chocolate, pecans, sugar, eggs
preparation: Baked fresh to order with crunchy nut topping.

name: Choco Chip Cookies
description: Crispy on the outside, chewy on the inside, loaded with chocolate chips.
ingredients: Flour, butter, brown sugar, chocolate chips, vanilla, baking soda

name: Pistachio Macaron Box
description: Six delicate pistachio macarons with a crisp shell and creamy filling.
ingredients: Almond flour, sugar, pistachio paste, egg whites
preparation: Made fresh and packaged carefully for gifting.

name: Masala Chai Cookies
description: Spiced tea cookies with cardamom, ginger and warm Indian masala flavours.
ingredients: Flour, butter, sugar, cardamom, ginger, tea leaves
preparation: Baked fresh in small batches for authentic taste.

name: Sourdough Bread
description: Naturally fermented sourdough with a crispy crust and tangy flavor.
ingredients: Whole wheat flour, sourdough starter, water, salt

name: Black Sesame Baguette
description: Crunchy artisan baguette studded with black sesame seeds and baked to a golden crust.
ingredients: Flour, yeast, sesame seeds, water, salt
preparation: Made fresh daily with a long fermentation process.

name: Garlic Herb Focaccia
description: Thick, fluffy focaccia topped with rosemary, garlic, and a drizzle of olive oil.
ingredients: Flour, yeast, olive oil, rosemary, garlic, salt

name: Cinnamon Swirl Bread
description: Soft, spiced bread with a buttery cinnamon swirl and sugar glaze.
ingredients: Flour, butter, cinnamon, sugar, yeast, milk
preparation: Rolled and baked fresh every morning.

name: Multigrain Whole Wheat Loaf
description: Nutty whole wheat loaf loaded with seeds, oats, and a hearty texture.
ingredients: Whole wheat flour, seeds, oats, honey, yeast, salt
preparation: Slow-proofed for a rich, nutty flavour.
